sourcesContent:
// src/pages/AdminDashboard.jsx import React from "react"; import { Box, Container, Typography, Grid, Card, CardContent, Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableContainer, TableHead, TableRow, Paper, Button, Chip, Avatar, List, ListItem, ListItemIcon, ListItemText, Divider, } from "@mui/material"; import DashboardIcon from "@mui/icons-material/Dashboard"; import LocalHospitalIcon from "@mui/icons-material/LocalHospital"; import PersonIcon from "@mui/icons-material/Person"; import CalendarMonthIcon from "@mui/icons-material/CalendarMonth"; import AddIcon from "@mui/icons-material/Add"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { useEffect } from "react"; const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { const isLoggedIn = localStorage.getItem("isAdminLoggedIn"); if (isLoggedIn !== "true") { navigate("/admin/login"); } }, [navigate]); // Fake data (replace with real state / API later) const stats = { hospitals: 5, doctors: 20, appointments: 45, }; const hospitals = [ { name: "City Care Hospital", location: "Kathmandu" }, { name: "Green Valley Medical Center", location: "Pokhara" }, { name: "Sunrise Hospital", location: "Lalitpur" }, ]; const doctors = [ { name: "Dr. Aashish Das", specialty: "Cardiology" }, { name: "Dr. Neha Sharma", specialty: "Neurology" }, { name: "Dr. Suman Thapa", specialty: "Orthopedics" }, ]; const appointments = [ { patient: "Sita Shrestha", doctor: "Dr. Aashish Das", hospital: "City Care Hospital", date: "15 May 2024", status: "Scheduled", }, { patient: "Ganesh Thapa", doctor: "Dr. Neha Sharma", hospital: "Green Valley Medical Center", date: "16 May 2024", status: "Scheduled", }, { patient: "Mina Shali", doctor: "Dr. Suman Thapa", hospital: "Sunrise Hospital", date: "17 May 2024", status: "Completed", }, { patient: "Arjun Karki", doctor: "Dr. Aashish Das", hospital: "City Care Hospital", date: "14 May 2024", status: "Completed", }, ]; const getStatusChip = (status) => { const colors = { Scheduled: "warning", Completed: "success", Cancelled: "error", }; return ( ); }; const AdminDashboard = () => { return ( {/* Sidebar */} Admin Dashboard {/* Main Content */} {/* Header */} Admin Dashboard A Admin {/* Stats Cards */} {stats.hospitals} Total Hospitals {stats.doctors} Total Doctors {stats.appointments} Total Appointments {/* Manage Sections */} {/* Manage Hospitals */} Manage Hospitals Hospital Name Location Actions {hospitals.map((h, i) => ( {h.name} {h.location} ))}
{/* Manage Doctors */} Manage Doctors Doctor Name Specialization Actions {doctors.map((d, i) => ( {d.name} {d.specialty} ))}
{/* Recent Appointments */} Recent Appointments Patient Name Doctor Hospital Date Status {appointments.map((appt, i) => ( {appt.patient} {appt.doctor} {appt.hospital} {appt.date} {getStatusChip(appt.status)} ))}
); }; ; export default AdminDashboard;
